Very large serviceberry tree in the corner of the parking lot, right in front of the ‘WorldPAC’ door. Berries were all past ripe in mid June. Falling Fruit season: May-May.

Right after the crosswalk as you walk to Harris Teeters. 2 serviceberries on either side of the road. They do get the fungus that causes them to look like ocean minds, must be a conflicting plant near by.
